allow: Bash(find /e/renthus-chat-erp -type f -name "package.json" -o -type f -name ".env*" -o -type f -name "tsconfig.json" -o -type f -name "next.config.js" 2>/dev/null | head -20)
Bash(cd E:/renthus-chat-erp && echo "9uncgv0uAEULBHF0" | supabase link --project-ref zwcfuvohxmvlxhdfbgxo --password 9uncgv0uAEULBHF0 2>&1)
Bash(cd E:/renthus-chat-erp && supabase migration repair --status applied 20260108053021 --password 9uncgv0uAEULBHF0 2>&1)
Bash(cd E:/renthus-chat-erp && supabase db push --password 9uncgv0uAEULBHF0 --debug 2>&1 | head -40)
Bash(cd "E:/renthus-chat-erp" && npx supabase db diff 2>&1 | head -20)
Bash(cd "E:/renthus-chat-erp" && npx supabase migration repair --status reverted 20260108053021 2>&1)
Bash(cd "E:/renthus-chat-erp" && npx supabase db dump --schema public 2>&1 | grep -A 5 "whatsapp_messages_direction")
Bash(cd "E:/renthus-chat-erp" && npx supabase db dump 2>&1 | head -5)

Bash(cd "E:/renthus-chat-erp" && echo "SELECT conname, pg_get_constraintdef\(oid\) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname LIKE '%direction%' OR conrelid = 'public.whatsapp_messages'::regclass;" | npx supabase db execute --stdin 2>&1)

Bash(cd "E:/renthus-chat-erp" && npx supabase inspect db locks 2>&1 | head -5
npx supabase --help 2>&1 | grep -i "sql\\|exec\\|query\\|run" | head -10)

Bash(rm "E:/renthus-chat-erp/supabase/migrations/20260313120001_temp_inspect_constraints.sql"
cd "E:/renthus-chat-erp" && npx supabase migration repair --status reverted 20260313120001 2>&1)
Bash(grep -rn "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS" E:/renthus-chat-erp/supabase/migrations/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^Binary" | sed 's/.*CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS //' | sed 's/[[:space:]].*//' | sort -u)

Bash(grep -rn "create table\\b" E:/renthus-chat-erp/supabase/migrations/ 2>/dev/null -i | grep -v "IF NOT EXISTS" | grep -v "^Binary" | sed 's/.*create table[[:space:]]*//' | sed 's/[[:space:]].*//' | sort -u)

Bash(grep -rhin "create table" E:/renthus-chat-erp/supabase/migrations/ 2>/dev/null | grep -oE "create table \(if not exists \)?\(public\\.\)?[a-z_]+" | sed "s/create table //i" | sed "s/if not exists //i" | sed "s/public\\.//" | sort -u)

Bash(cat E:/renthus-chat-erp/lib/whatsapp/send.ts
cat E:/renthus-chat-erp/lib/supabase/admin.ts 2>/dev/null || find E:/renthus-chat-erp/lib/supabase/ -name "*.ts" | head -5)

Bash(cd E:/renthus-chat-erp && npx supabase db query "SELECT c.id, c.name, c.nome_fantasia, c.whatsapp_phone, c.is_active FROM companies c WHERE c.id IN \(SELECT DISTINCT company_id FROM products WHERE company_id IS NOT NULL\) OR c.name ILIKE '%disk%' OR c.name ILIKE '%bebida%' OR c.name ILIKE '%loja%' ORDER BY c.name;" 2>&1)

Bash(cd E:/renthus-chat-erp && npx supabase db query "SELECT wc.id, wc.company_id, wc.provider, wc.status, wc.from_identifier, wc.provider_metadata, c.name as company_name FROM whatsapp_channels wc JOIN companies c ON c.id = wc.company_id;" 2>&1)
Bash(cd E:/renthus-chat-erp && grep -v "^#" .env.local | grep -v "^$" | grep -v "SECRET\\|PASSWORD\\|TOKEN\\|KEY" | head -20)
Bash(cd E:/renthus-chat-erp && npx supabase --version && cat supabase/config.toml | grep "project_id\\|ref" | head -5)
Bash(cd E:/renthus-chat-erp && npx supabase inspect db db-stats --project-ref zwcfuvohxmvlxhdfbgxo 2>&1 | head -20)
Bash(cd E:/renthus-chat-erp && npx supabase inspect db db-stats --linked 2>&1 | head -15)
Bash(cd E:/renthus-chat-erp && npx supabase db dump --data-only -t companies --linked 2>&1 | grep -v "^--\\|^SET\\|^SELECT pg\\|^$\\|^INSERT INTO\\|^\\\\\\." | head -40)
Bash(cd E:/renthus-chat-erp && npx supabase db dump --data-only --linked 2>&1 | grep -E "^COPY companies|^[0-9a-f-]{36}" | head -20)

Bash(SUPA_URL="https://zwcfuvohxmvlxhdfbgxo.supabase.co/rest/v1"
KEY="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6Inp3Y2Z1dm9oeG12bHhoZGZiZ3hvIiwicm9sZSI6InNlcnZpY2Vfcm9sZSIsImlhdCI6MTc2NzE0NDA2OCwiZXhwIjoyMDgyNzIwMDY4fQ.Pp5CjyUI654bnj1xJiAIVj0DqXVln5kLxg_DisPdP_U"
H="-H \\"apikey: $KEY\\" -H \\"Authorization: Bearer $KEY\\""

echo "=== ORDERS \(últimos 3\) ===" && \\
curl -s "$SUPA_URL/orders?order=created_at.desc&limit=3&select=*" \\
  -H "apikey: $KEY" -H "Authorization: Bearer $KEY" | node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\);let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\(JSON.parse\(d\),null,2\)\)\)")

  -H "apikey: $KEY" -H "Authorization: Bearer $KEY" | node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\);let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\(JSON.parse\(d\),null,2\)\)\)"

echo "=== DELETE chatbot_sessions ===" && \\
curl -s -X DELETE "$SUPA_URL/chatbot_sessions?thread_id=eq.2dff0ed1-1059-40d0-8e88-45e417447ce7" \\
  -H "apikey: $KEY" -H "Authorization: Bearer $KEY" \\
  -H "Prefer: return=representation" \\
  -w "\\nHTTP %{http_code}" | node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\);let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const lines=d.split\('\\n'\);const http=lines.pop\(\);const body=lines.join\('\\n'\);try{const j=JSON.parse\(body\);console.log\('Deletados:',j.length,'| ids:',j.map\(r=>r.id\)\);console.log\(http\);}catch{console.log\(body\);console.log\(http\);}}\)"

echo "" && echo "=== DELETE customers phone +556692771743 ===" && \\
curl -s -X DELETE "$SUPA_URL/customers?phone=eq.%2B556692771743" \\
  -H "apikey: $KEY" -H "Authorization: Bearer $KEY" \\
  -H "Prefer: return=representation" \\
  -w "\\nHTTP %{http_code}" | node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\);let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const lines=d.split\('\\n'\);const http=lines.pop\(\);const body=lines.join\('\\n'\);try{const j=JSON.parse\(body\);console.log\('Deletados:',j.length,'registros'\);if\(j.length\)console.log\(JSON.stringify\(j,null,2\)\);console.log\(http\);}catch{console.log\(body\);console.log\(http\);}}\)")
